items.title: Orbán's era was over in a flash and Hungary's next PM is a man in a hurry
items.dek: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.
items.body: Péter Magyar and his Tisza party are wasting no time preparing for the transfer of power after their dramatic landslide victory.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Suns end Warriors' season, await No. 1 Thunder
items.dek: The Suns knocked out the Warriors 111-96 on Friday night to secure the No. 8 seed and will face the top-seeded Thunder in the first round of the playoffs.
items.body: The Suns knocked out the Warriors 111-96 on Friday night to secure the No. 8 seed and will face the top-seeded Thunder in the first round of the playoffs.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Fuel truck leaves trail of fire on road in Syria
items.dek: Eyewitnesses captured the moment a burning fuel tanker drove through the centre of Hasakah, Syria, leaving a trail of fire behind it.
items.body: Eyewitnesses captured the moment a burning fuel tanker drove through the centre of Hasakah, Syria, leaving a trail of fire behind it.
items.author: IriLine Desk
